raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within the 10 cm claw limit, its left and right sides are accessible, and no object obstructs the right arm’s lateral approach.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held in the robot’s right claw and cleared from its initial position in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (right of box_2)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the region on the tabletop to the right of box_2 is free of obstacles.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released onto the specified clear area of the table, freeing the front of box_2 for manipulation."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Front face of box_2 is reachable after the cup has been relocated, and there is sufficient free space on the table to the right of box_2 to accommodate its sliding motion.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated rightwards, clearing the right side of box_1 and creating enough lateral space for a dual-arm grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both the left and right sides of box_1 are now unobstructed; the robot’s arms have clearance to approach laterally and enclose the box without interference from neighbouring objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly grasped on its left and right sides by the robot’s two arms and lifted slightly, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within the 10 cm claw limit, its left and right sides are accessible, and no object obstructs the right arm’s lateral approach.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held in the robot’s right claw and cleared from its initial position in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the region on the tabletop to the right of box_2 is free of obstacles.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released onto the specified clear area of the table, freeing the front of box_2 for manipulation.

parsed_json.Precondition: Front face of box_2 is reachable after the cup has been relocated, and there is sufficient free space on the table to the right of box_2 to accommodate its sliding motion.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated rightwards, clearing the right side of box_1 and creating enough lateral space for a dual-arm grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both the left and right sides of box_1 are now unobstructed; the robot’s arms have clearance to approach laterally and enclose the box without interference from neighbouring objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly grasped on its left and right sides by the robot’s two arms and lifted slightly, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
